title: cephalocarpus glabra
intro: Cephalocarpus glabra, also known as Indian staff tree, is a medicinal plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Cephalocarpus glabra can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
